data.title: Sprint drift detection and brainstorm suggestion for relates_to coordination links
data.description: Follow-on epic stub. Sprint drift detection follows relates_to links to detect when related epic closure impacts in-progress plans. Brainstorm suggests relates_to links from shared artifact impact scan. Depends on shared artifact impact analysis epic and Jira bridge LINK sync epic. Needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (depth-capped stub).
